{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Master of the Labyrinth
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Dreadgod (novel)|Dreadgod]]
}}

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Master of the Labyrinth]] is mentioned as someone who could quiet squires in a duel.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Master of the Labyrinth]] is located above the [[labyrinth]]'s heart.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
